category_sources: Official GitHub repository https://github.com/becheran/mlc describes Markup Link Checker as checking broken links in HTML and Markdown files.
source_facts.description says mlc checks for broken links in markup files.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository https://github.com/becheran/mlc uses the README heading Markup Link Checker.
source_facts.name provides the executable/package name mlc.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; its README documents installation, CI integration, usage, and options.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated in the input, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README says Markdown and HTML files are supported and that it integrates with CI pipelines.
source_facts.description says it checks broken links in markup files.
